activation.reason: V8 can select human_gate but cannot safely complete it without an explicit approval artifact and resumable ingestion contract.

assumptions.claim: A git-tracked approval artifact is the only trusted first-slice source for satisfying human_gate.
assumptions.verification: Require approval JSON under fixtures/v9/approvals, prove it is tracked by git, and require source V8 path, source packet id, phase id, decision, approved output, and attestations.

assumptions.claim: Completing human_gate should not execute, merge, deploy, or publish anything.
assumptions.verification: V9 writes only approval, state, hashes, status, resume, and journal artifacts under owned out/v9/.

budget.file_touch_limit: one new script plus V9 approval fixture, docs, release checks, and roadmap updates

first_slice.completion_check: out/v9/v32-semantic-dogfood/status.json reports workflow-complete and human_approved_phase_ids human_gate
first_slice.expected_output: V9 state, hashes, status, resume, approval markdown, and journal artifacts
first_slice.instruction: Consume one trusted V8 human_gate frontier and one git-tracked human approval artifact, then mark the terminal human gate complete without executing anything.

objective: Design the first V9 human-gate resolution slice that consumes V8 human_gate frontier state and an explicit approval artifact, then emits final trusted runtime state.

barriers: frontier validation before human gate resolution
human gate resolution before resume verification
parallelism.fan_in_rule: No fan-in in the first slice; one human_gate approval is resolved at a time.

entry_criteria: approval artifact is tracked by git under fixtures/v9/approvals
exit_criteria: approval matches source packet and human_gate phase
phases.name: Approval Validation

exit_criteria: recomputed frontier has no ready or blocked phases
phases.name: Human Gate Resolution

exit_criteria: resume recomputes state, approval markdown, journal, and hashes
phases.name: Resume Verification

invalidators: generated state, approval markdown, journal, or hashes tampering

risk_gates.safe_default: stop before writing and ask for approval
stop before shell use and ask for approval
stop before network use and ask for approval

source_prompt: Design the next workflow after V8 selected human_gate.

verification.claim_or_output: V9 consumes only a trusted V8 human_gate frontier and matching approval artifact.
verification.falsifier: A mismatched or rejected approval can produce workflow-complete status.

verification.claim_or_output: V9 completes the dogfood workflow only after human_gate is approved.
verification.falsifier: V9 reports workflow-complete without human_approved_phase_ids containing human_gate, or reports frontier-ready without emitting packets.

verification.claim_or_output: V9 generated artifacts are resumable and tamper-evident.
verification.falsifier: Generated state, approval markdown, journal, or hashes can drift without invalidating resume.

stop_conditions: approval artifact is missing or mismatched
execution, merge, deploy, external action, or nonterminal frontier emission would be required
